title: graph command double-brackets status labels
description: PROM-073's cmd_graph renders status as [[BLOCKED] / [[BACKLOG] etc — the inner [BLOCKED] is meant as a literal label but rich console interprets the outer [ as a markup tag opener and adds a second [ when escaping. Should use plain console.print or escape via square-bracket-equivalent (e.g. (BLOCKED) or backslash-escape).
proposed_changes: In cmd_graph, replace [{status}] formatting with parentheses or use rich's escape() helper from rich.markup.
